name: draw-vector-art
description: Reliable semantic scene-to-SVG drawing for Codex

interface.longDescription: Draw polished flat-geometric SVGs through reusable semantic parts, modeled transforms and paint, deterministic rendering, structural validation, and a visual refinement loop.
defaultPrompt: Draw a polished editable vector icon.
Adapt this reference into clean SVG geometry.
Validate and improve this unreliable SVG.
